lines.speaker: Gita Prymes
lines.text: Have ye come for an outfit like mine? Or else whatcha want?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are you?

lines.speaker: Gita Prymes
lines.text: Don't ye recognise the greatest angler in all the land? Never mind Grandpa Jack an' Big Dave, or that jack-of-all-trades Mac - I'm Gita Prymes!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Have you won the Hemenster Fishing Competition?

lines.speaker: Gita Prymes
lines.text: Um...

lines.speaker: Gita Prymes
lines.text: Keep yer triflin' talk of poxy contests - Gita Prymes has bigger fish to catch! And I am Gita Prymes.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, you're Gita Prymes.

lines.speaker: Gita Prymes
lines.text: That I be! Now, are ye here for an outfit like mine?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, you're Gita Prymes.

lines.speaker: Gita Prymes
lines.text: That I be! Now, are ye here for an outfit like mine?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Let's talk about outfits.

lines.speaker: Gita Prymes
lines.text: Aye. See, a lot of anglers wear ugly green stuff. It 'elps them wi' the fishing, to be sure, but they look so rotten in it. So Gita Prymes invented something better- looking.

lines.speaker: Gita Prymes
lines.text: It'll cost ye some spirit flakes but Gita Prymes can change yer Spirit Angler back to normal Angler for free if ye want it. Which ever suits ye.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you turn my Angler outfit into the Spirit Angler outfit?

lines.speaker: Gita Prymes
lines.text: Sure, hand me a piece of the regular Angler kit. I'll want 1,200 spirit flakes for a hat, the top for 1,200 spirit flakes, the leggings for 1,200 spirit flakes and the footwear for 1,200 spirit flakes.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Actually, I don't have any Angler kit on me at the moment, sorry.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you turn my Spirit Angler outfit back into the regular Angler outfit?

lines.speaker: Gita Prymes
lines.text: Sure, hand me a piece of the Spirit Angler kit an' I'll convert it back for free.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Actually, I don't have any Spirit Angler kit on me at the moment, sorry.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't think I need anything from you.

sections.title: If given anything that isn't an angler's outfit piece

lines.speaker: Gita Prymes
lines.text: Nay, Gita Prymes won't take that.
